form.formComment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a 1.5 lengths second over 350m this track in 19.66. In the money last time and looks well placed. Can go one better.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last over 350m at this track beaten 8 lengths (19.40) behind Michigan in a Free For All on March 15. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 350m at this track clocking 19.48. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance leading throughout to post a big 3 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at Horsham, clocking a hot 23.20 for the 410m trip. In form and must include in calculations at odds.
